description: Evidence-backed candidate skill batch from Phase 56 founder field prompts, Phase 58 prompt matrix, and Phase 60 refined prompt guidance.

candidates.natural_prompt: In <repo>, follow a named handler branch through the downstream snapshot or service function. Read only. Return handler file, flow steps, evidence refs, and related tests.
candidates.rationale: P08 passed after harness tightening, but field evidence shows handler prompts can stop too early unless branch-following is explicit.

candidates.natural_prompt: In <repo>, find only the named table schema. Read only. Return model files, schema field names, and source refs without mixing runtime dictionary fields.
candidates.rationale: P11 field evidence shows schema requests need a narrower table-only procedure to avoid mixing storage schema with runtime fields.

candidates.natural_prompt: In <repo>, locate the runtime entrypoint for a named subsystem and distinguish it from adjacent service or UI entrypoints. Read only. Return command, source refs, and exclusions.
candidates.rationale: P16 field evidence shows entrypoint prompts need explicit subsystem disambiguation to avoid returning adjacent service startup files.

candidates.natural_prompt: In <repo>, identify files to touch and files not to touch for a minimal safe behavior change. Read only and stop before implementation. Return risks, gaps, and verification commands.
candidates.rationale: P21 field evidence shows minimal safe change-surface prompts are clearer when touch and do-not-touch boundaries are both requested.

stop_conditions: candidate route key overlaps an existing route key
candidate eval case id overlaps an existing eval case id
candidate semantic intent overlaps an existing non-deprecated skill
candidate requires a new workflow or artifact before the roadmap approves it
candidate implies source mutation or advanced refactor orchestration
